summary: Vitalize offers a 30-day return window from delivery date. Eligibility depends on product condition, reason for return, and whether the item was opened.

eligible_conditions.notes: Unopened, factory-sealed product is always eligible within the return window.
Opened but clearly unused (e.g., seal intact inside, no scooping). Eligible within return window.
Partially used product. 50% refund if returned within window and less than half consumed.
Item arrived damaged or defective. Full refund regardless of whether it was opened. Customer does not need to return the item.
Incorrect item shipped. Full refund or free replacement, customer's choice.

ineligible_conditions.notes: Returns requested more than 30 days after delivery are not accepted unless the item is damaged or defective.
Products where more than half the contents have been consumed are not eligible for return.
Products past their expiration date at the time of return request are not eligible.

auto_approve_rules.notes: Refunds at or below $50 are auto-approved by the agent. Refunds above $50 must be escalated to a human for review.

process.damaged_item: Agent issues full refund automatically. No return shipping required. Customer keeps the item.
process.standard_return: Agent confirms eligibility and issues refund or partial refund per condition rules.
process.escalation: Agent escalates to human if refund exceeds auto-approve threshold, situation is ambiguous, or customer mentions a medical concern.
